relationship.description: One user (poster) can create many posts; each post references its creator via user_id
One user can author many comments; each comment stores the author’s user_id
A post can receive many comments; each comment stores the post_id it belongs to
A user can follow many other users; each FOLLOW row records the follower_id
Each FOLLOW row also references the followed user via followee_id

metadata.improvements_made: Added password_salt for secure password storage, introduced ENUM-like visibility attribute, added soft-delete flag (is_deleted) to USER, POST, and COMMENT, clarified foreign-key attributes, and retained audit fields. The model now supports logical deletion, better security practices, and clearer visibility semantics while preserving all original relationships and strengths.
